productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Leather Blue Passport Holder
description: Style NoteWorry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your bottomless tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish passport holder from united colors of benetton. This timeless piece is a must have essential. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Product DetailsHas a flap style openingEight card holders, one mesh id card holder, three compartments, one pen holder in the middle, one flap for any documentBig Ben logo in a metallic  embellishment appliquéd on the topMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSize21 cm x 11 cm
